creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Hi.

Sorry about the delay and thanks for your report.

We have now an html target for offline usage, but the html build was disabled in misc/freebsd-doc-* ports.

Passing this PR to doceng@ to fix/keep track.

1 - https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/tree/documentation/Makefile#n12

Regards.
